# Security Checklist: Ingest municipal census datasets

**Purpose**: Validate safe ingestion, error isolation, and auditability.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/018-census-ingest/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Data Safety

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Validation blocks invalid schemas, values, or missing keys from publication.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Coverage thresholds gate promotion to prevent incomplete indicators.
- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Promotion is atomic to avoid partial updates.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-004 Failures report actionable details without exposing sensitive data.
- [x] CHK-SEC-005 Promotion failures leave production indicators intact.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-006 Run identifiers and provenance metadata are recorded for audits.
